title: Mallow the Cat
tone: Whimsical, comedic, overly dramatic from a feline perspective, cozy.
goal: Assert total dominance over the Hawthorne Estate, thwart the neighborhood squirrel mafia, and find the fabled Sunbeam of Infinite Warmth.
setting: The Hawthorne Estate, a sprawling, slightly eccentric Victorian mansion with a wild, overgrown garden.
main_character: Mallow (A fluffy, slightly overweight marshmallow-white ragdoll house cat. Highly judgmental, food-motivated, and surprisingly agile when startled).
starting_situation: Waking up from a 14-hour nap on the forbidden velvet armchair to discover an absolute tragedy: the food bowl is only half-full, and a strange, tough-looking tabby cat is sitting on your garden fence.
